downstream_consumers.agents/ingestion/segment.py: depends only on LLMClient interface (type-only); no change needed, no direct dependency on factory required by this subtask (ingestion currently wires OllamaClient explicitly per docs/LLD/ingestion-agent.md's cost rationale) -- factory is additive infra for future query-time wiring, not a forced migration of ingestion's existing wiring in this run.
downstream_consumers.agents/query/: empty package (__init__.py only); no existing call site to migrate. Future subtasks that add query/intent-refiner etc. are expected to call agents.llm.factory.create_llm_client() rather than importing a concrete provider class.

risk: Low: purely additive new module + new test file, no existing passing test or production code path is modified.

Naming/convention risk: LLD did not specify an env var name; PROVIDER_ENV_VAR='LLM_PROVIDER' is this run's own choice, documented in requirement.md and factory.py's docstring for future subtasks/reviewers to follow consistently.
test_impact: New test file only; existing 52 passing tests in agents/llm/ untouched and must remain green (regression check).
regression_scope: cd agents && python3 -m pytest llm/ -q (all of agents/llm/, not just the new file) plus ruff on the two new files.
